title: 10 best herbal teas for jellyfish sting
description: Lemon teas helps with jellyfish sting because its citrus properties help to neutralize the venomous compounds released by the jellyfish. The acidity of lemon tea can also help to break down the sticky substance on the stinging cells, allowing for easier removal and reducing the risk of further irritation. Additionally, the antioxidants present in herbs such as peppermint or chamomile in the tea may help to calm the skin and reduce inflammation caused by the sting....
